headline: Genuine Parts Company (GPC): Billionaire Seth Klarman Strengthens Bet
summary: Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC) is one of the 15 Best Stocks to Buy According to Billionaire Seth Klarman. Genuine Parts Company (NYSE:GPC) is a relatively new addition to the 13F portfolio of Baupost Group. The fund bought a stake in the company in the fourth quarter of 2024, comprising more than 300,000 shares. However, it […]

headline: Genuine Parts Company CIO retires amid major overhaul
summary: The automotive and industrial parts distributor said it has no plans to replace Naveen Krishna as it undertakes dividing the company.
